arts.ttl: Liverpool or Real Madrid? Alexander-Arnold makes 'final decision'
arts.sum: Trent Alexander-Arnold has told Liverpool that he wants to join Real Madrid, according to Spanish media. Star players Mohamed Salah, Virgil van Dijk and Trent Alexander-Arnold are all set to be free agents in the summer and so far none of them appear to be close to officially extending their stay despite having been offered fresh terms.
